improvement.purpose: Produce secret-free Cloudflare environment readiness and exact operator setup-plan artifacts without attempting deployment or claiming deployment proof.

isolated_contract_tests.scope: byte-equivalent setup-plan logic reconstructed from committed source

source_review: workflow references the cloudflare-research GitHub Environment
secret values are passed only as process environment inputs
readiness failure is deferred until after artifact upload
privacy and deployment-proof boundaries are asserted
no payment or Vercel behavior is present

limits: No GitHub Actions execution was observable for the workflow commit.
No Cloudflare deployment URL or served identity was produced.
Configuration readiness is not deployment evidence.
The workflow may remain blocked until repository environment execution is permitted and required secrets are configured.
privacy_boundary: Only secret names, configured booleans, and non-sensitive reason codes may be emitted; secret values must not appear in artifacts, logs, commits, or queue records.
falsification_route: Run the workflow and reject this implementation if artifacts are missing, any secret value appears, the plan claims deployment proof, or the required secret set differs from CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.
